Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}I understand one of my group has caused you some trouble.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}It must be difficult looking after her. After all, you likely can't rein her in for very long...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Or, could it be you've already killed her?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Then, I assume her symptoms have arisen?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Considering Kirijo's resourcefulness, you would have had access to the suppressants as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Then, I take it you've had to use the suppressants.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}As I'd expect from Kirijo's resourcefulness. And, you now have someone with firsthand experience among your number as well...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}If you already know about the suppressants, that simplifies things.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Can you imagine it? A Persona-user, murdered by their other half...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Such is the fate of a Persona that has gone berserk.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}...As you have already seen for yourself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}This power of ours is not meant to be wielded by just anyone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}That holds true, even for those who were awakened by force...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}It comes at a great cost, and we can only harness it by walking the line between life and death. This power makes us who we are.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}And yet... you hold the ability to wield so many.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}The Dark Hour has graced you with its favor. Almost unjustly so, from our perspective.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Don't you think it'd be a shame for you to lose such a special power?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_009_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's for the sake of the world.

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}You stubbornly cling to that sentiment...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Do you have no intention of understanding anything?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Choosing to turn a blind eye towards your own power, to the grief of the fallen, the unchosen, the unloved...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Such apathy... Such insolence... You trample upon everything we stand for![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}And worst of all, your rejection of my—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}You tread upon your gifts like dirt, and in doing so, reveal your own arrogance...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}I see now that nothing will change your mind.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}If our beliefs are at odds with each other, and neither side is willing to concede...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Then a battle is unavoidable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}Our final confrontation will come in our own time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}You have been blessed with a power greater than any other, and yet you don't see its true value...[n]{f 1 1}
